understanding.goal_understanding: To reach the goal gem '+' by moving horizontally then falling with gravity until landing on it, within the step limit.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement is only left/right; after each move, gravity pulls the player automatically to a solid tile, hazard, or goal. Clicks remove breakable 'x' tiles to open paths. Spikes 'u/v' cause instant loss. Gravity direction (DOWN/UP) determines fall direction. Moves_left/right consume steps; clicks do not. No UNDO was used in this episode.
